
### Linux system call filtering API  {.smaller}


* privilege seperation support: system call filtering
* simple API: `prctl(SECCOMP_SET_MODE_STRICT, 0, 0)`
<hr class="vspace" />
* ‘‘The only system calls the calling thread is permitted to make are <code>read</code>, <code>write</code>, <code>_exit</code>, and <code>sigreturn</code>. Other system calls [kill the program].’’
* read/write only work on <em>already open files</em> 
<hr class="vspace" />
* later: what if we want to be finer-grained?
